c.d: The number of active users on the platform, impacting the potential reach of listings.
How simple and quick it is to create a listing, including photo uploads and description writing.
The percentage or flat fees charged to sellers per transaction or listing.
Availability and flexibility of shipping methods including discounted labels, home pickup, or local delivery.
Whether the app supports local selling only or also national/international sales.
Types of items best suited for the platform such as clothes, electronics, collectibles, or furniture.
Features like user identity verification and secure payment options that enhance seller and buyer safety.
The intuitiveness and modernity of the app interface affecting user experience.
